Grid.TextBlock:
1. (S) SITUATION: USSR forces are en route Attu Island attempting to seize the island as negotiating leverage in the ongoing peace talks between the Warsaw Pact and NATO. While forces were observed getting underway from Kamchatka, including Task Force Vostok, inclement weather has driven off all ISR flights, and enemy forces have been unlocated for several days. Elements of Task Force 75.3 have been rushed north to aid in the defense and assets from Carrier Air Wing 11 have surged deployed to Casco airfield on Attu. Gather your forces, locate the invasion force and destroy them.
2. (S) MISSION: 2.1 Destroy all amphibious forces en route Attu Island. 2.2 Destroy all remaining forces as able.
3. (S) EXECUTION: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. Recommend full EMCON until P-3 checks in to establish surface picture. 3.2 TF 75.3 is en route from the south. 3.3 CVW-11 forces are on station at Attu.
4. (S) ENEMY OOB: 4.1 Task Force Vostok 4.1.1 1x Slava 4.1.2 1x Sovremennyy 4.1.3 1x Kresta 4.1.4 1x Victor SSN (missing from imagery) 4.2 Invasion Force 4.2.1 1x Sovremennyy 4.2.2 1x Kresta 4.2.3 1x Kara 4.2.4 2x Amphibious forces
5. (S) FRIENDLY OOB: 5.1 TF 75.3 5.1.1 USS Texas CGN-39 5.1.2 USS Worden CG-18 5.1.3 USS Callaghan DDG-994 5.1.4 USS Copeland FFG-24 5.2 CVW-11 Detachment 5.2.1 2x P-3, 1 off deck en route seach area 5.2.2 6x F-14A 5.2.3 4x A-6E 5.2.4 2x A-7E
6. (S) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Assess with medium confidence that USSR attack submarines will be escorting the invasion force. 6.2 Assess with high confidence that USSR aircraft will support the invasion force. 6.3 Assess with high confidence that weather is clearing up in the next 2-6 hours.
